titleStmt.title: SII 16.134: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 134. (A.R. No. 700 of 1917.) ĀKUMAḶḶA, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up on a platform at the entrance into the village.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhin, Kārtika śu. 12, corresponding to 1544 A.D., October 27, (Monday).

It registers the remission of all taxes such as śrōtriyam, kaṭnam etc., payable to the palace by the mahājanas of the village Ākumaḷḷa in Avuku-sīma held by him as a nāyaṅkara from the king by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara China-Timmayyadēva-Mahārāju, son of Timmarāju, grandson of Rāmarāju and the great-grandson of Āravīṭi Bukkarāju of the Ātrēya-gōtra and Śōma-vaṁśa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1466 Agunēṭi krōdhisaṁvatsara kā¨rtika śu 12 lu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēvarāya mahā
rāyalu vijayānagaramaṁddu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthivirājyaṁ cēyu
cuṁḍagānu śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara sōmavaṁśādhīśvarulaina Ātrēya gōtra pa
vitṛlaina Āravīṭi bukkarājugāri prapautṛlu rāmarājugāri pautṛlu tiṁ
marājugāri putṛlu cinatiṁmmayya dēvamahārājulugāru yajanayā
janaAdhyeyanaAdhyāpakadāna(dāna)pratigrahaṣaṭka¨rmaniratulaina Ākumā
ḷa sthitāsēṣavidvaṁnmahājanālakunnu Iccina dha(ṁ)¨rmaśāsanamu mā nāyaṁ
kkarānaku celle Āvukuśīmalōni mī Ākumāḷa Agrahārāna nagariki be
ṭṭe srōtriyaṁ kaṭnaṁ kānikelu veṭṭivēmi sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu sahiraṁ
ṇyōdakadānadhārāpū¨rvaka(ṁ)mugānu dhāravōsti(ṁ)mi trivācakaṁgā
nu dhāravōstimi mī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Āceṁdrā¨rkasthāyi
gānu Anubhaviṁccēdi(di) . yiṁdduku yevvaru tappinānu mānaṁlēni
vāru śrī śrī . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sa¨rvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na
karagrāṁhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā . maṁggaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
